2604.26507.title: Auto-Relational Reasoning
2604.26507.paper_summary: Background & Objectives: In the last decade, Machine learning research has grown rapidly, but large models are reaching their soft limits demonstrating diminishing returns and still lack solid reasoning abilities. These limits could be surpassed through synergistic combination of Machine Learning scalability and rigid reasoning. Methods: In this work, we propose a theoretical framework for reasoning through object-relations in an automated manner integrated with Artificial Neural Networks. We present a formal analysis of the Reasoning, and we show the theory in practice through a paradigm integrating Reasoning and Machine Learning. Results: This paradigm is a system that solves Intelligence Quotient problems without any prior knowledge of the problem. Our system achieves 98.03% solving rate corresponding to the top 1% percentile or 132-144 iq score. This result is only limited by the small size of the model and the processing capabilities of the machine it run on. Conclusions: With the integration of prior knowledge in the system and the expansion of the dataset, the system can be generalized to solve a large category of problems. The functionality of the system inherently favors the solution of such problems in few-shot or zero-shot attempts.
2604.26507.paper_summary_zh: 背景與目標：在過去十年中，機器學習研究迅速增長，但大型模型正達到其軟性極限，顯示出收益遞減，且仍缺乏穩固的推理能力。這些極限可以通過機器學習的可擴展性與嚴謹推理的協同組合來克服。方法：在本研究中，我們提出了一個理論框架，用於通過物體關係以自動化的方式進行推理，並與人工神經網絡整合。我們對推理進行了正式分析，並通過一個整合推理與機器學習的範式展示該理論在實踐中的應用。結果：這一範式是一個能夠在沒有任何問題先驗知識的情況下解決智商問題的系統。我們的系統達到了98.03%的解題率，對應於前1%的百分位數或132-144的智商分數。這一結果僅受限於模型的小規模和運行該模型的機器的處理能力。結論：通過在系統中整合先驗知識和擴展數據集，該系統可以被泛化以解決大類問題。系統的功能本質上有利於在少量樣本或零樣本嘗試中解決此類問題。
2604.26507.author: Ioannis Konstantoulas et.al.
2604.26507.authors: Ioannis Konstantoulas, Dimosthenis Tsimas, Pavlos Peppas, Kyriakos Sgarbas
